title: The Girl With The Blurred Face
desc: Javier travels the world without leaving his computer on Google Earth but when a mysterious figure begins to appear across the globe, his sanity disintegrates. A horror for the modern age.

title: Despues Del Final
desc: After a zombie apocalypse obliterates humanity, a couple forages for survival with only themselves, a jovial DJ and the undead for company.

title: A Guy Walks Into A Bar
desc: Fred Savage stars in this award-winning comedy. A teenager leaves home to pursue his dream of becoming an actor, but a meeting with a breath-taking hitchhiker may derail his aspiration.

title: Car Trouble
desc: A routine car breakdown spirals into unexpected chaos. As the man attempts repairs, strange events unfold turning his day upside down.

title: Wolf Of Chawl Street
desc: A mockumentary set in the crime-driven slum areas of Mumbai. Luv is a loved slumboy who gets inspired by the British artist 'Banksy', and initiates a business in vandalism.

title: Velocity Rules
desc: Midwestern housewife accidentally discovers she's a superhero.

title: Dodgie
desc: This is Film - Animation Category.

title: Ice Pepper
desc: Roger and Billy, two penguins, wander around the sea ice. Within a hidden ice cave, they discover crates full of chili peppers with an unusual property.

title: Made in France
desc: Investigating what happens to the socks people lose every day.

title: The Physics of Sorrow
desc: A man reflects on the different stages of his melancholic life. He tries to make sense of the unpredictable journey of life.

title: Them
desc: A self-proclaimed leader appears out of nowhere in a forgotten village and begins to change the way the locals live in an attempt to disrupt their unity.

title: The Waiting Room
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Alam
desc: Filled with remorse, a young man is ignorant of nature. Soon, various natural elements confront him and he realises the impact of his actions on nature as well as the people around him.

title: The Old Man Next Door
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Friday Night
desc: Three rich teenage girls sneak off to paint the town red. When their taxi ends up on the outskirts of town, they not only have to deal with the Indian underclasses, but also with each other.

title: Gone Camping
desc: A hilarious and endearing family comedy. An awkward teenage girl is excited to go to a friend's sleepover but her mother derails her plans but insisting they go on a bonding experience.

title: New Bombay Cafe
desc: An ageing woman reminiscences about her incomplete love story in a forgotten cafe, as her past lover takes his final breath.

title: Sometimes, I Think About Dying
desc: Fran likes to think about dying, but befriends a colleague who begins to challenge her mindset.

title: Pasta
desc: A man and a woman eat pasta. They express their love and their heartbreak, they approach and they distance themselves, all while a waiter brings them more pasta.

title: Alex, Listen to Your Heart
desc: Alex has given up on love until his heart calls him on a phone to convince him otherwise.

title: Crush Hour
desc: The lovely lady in the yellow hat and the gentleman in the purple jumper might just be soul mates.

title: Easy Way Out
desc: Martin and Kaitlin play out their relationship endgame in the loft they once called home.

title: Doublespeak
desc: A young woman finally gathers the courage to lodge a complaint against her superior for sexual harassment at her workplace. Soon, she has to deal with the ugly aftermath of reporting her case.

title: Fata Morgana
desc: A middle-aged couple from China travel to the United States for the first time. They make this journey so they can organise the funeral rites of their only child.

title: The Last Kwak
desc: A hunting dog will do everything to catch the duck his master has been looking forever.

title: Blind Eye
desc: In a world that worships the Almighty Eye, two siblings find themselves escaping from sacrifice, only to discover their world is not what it appeared to be.

title: Killing Time
desc: Loukoum can't stand the passage of Time any more. She decides to go face it in person and free herself from its control. But can you really get rid of Time itself?

title: Protocole Sandwich
desc: In a wild uninhabited desert, a team of rangers is in charge of rescuing people who got lost there. One of them, Jean-Mi, is going to draw apart from the group and meet an unexpected character.

title: Night of the Living Data
desc: Due to an attack by a virus, a computer programmer is transformed into a zombie. His only saving grace from the unpleasant situation is to get in contact with nature.

title: 10x10 Ft
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Ghazaal
desc: An award-winning drama. A teenage refugee scrapes by in a settlement camp by selling items and clothes but she becomes increasingly desperate when she receives her period.

title: Teacher
desc: A teacher comes to know that his students are being bullied outside class. He then takes it upon himself to punish the bullies.

title: Aai Am Single
desc: A young man sacrifices his personal life to look after his single mother. However, a new revelation casts a different light on their relationship.

title: Speed,.
desc: Hardik, who wishes to become a car racer, practises very hard, but his ankle never supports him.

title: I Used to Be Famous
desc: A star of a former boy band is failing to reignite his career but is inspired when he crosses paths with an autistic music prodigy. The short that inspired the feature length comedy drama.

title: Master Maggie
desc: A celebrity acting coach is interrupted by an unknown actor begging for help for a TV audition. What follows is an unexpected journey for the both of them.

title: The Physics of Sorrow
desc: A man reflects on the different stages of his melancholic life. He tries to make sense of the unpredictable journey of life.

title: Be Mine
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Skin & Bone
desc: After taking a job on a reclusive woman's farm, a drifter begins suffering from visions of men trapped inside the bodies of animals.

title: Anselmo
desc: A mysterious man hires an artist to paint his portrait every 12 years, but his latest painter learns that there is a deeper secret within himself.

title: The Girl With The Blurred Face
desc: Javier travels the world without leaving his computer on Google Earth but when a mysterious figure begins to appear across the globe, his sanity disintegrates. A horror for the modern age.

title: Despues Del Final
desc: After a zombie apocalypse obliterates humanity, a couple forages for survival with only themselves, a jovial DJ and the undead for company.
A person with a defect in his memory wipe, wakes up with the realisation that he lost something.

title: Grey Collar
desc: Three identical strangers embark on a journey which leads to dangerous predicament.

title: Destiny
desc: A clock-obsessed man wakes up to a perfect routine, only to be hit by a bus. He awakens again, seconds behind his previous self, facing a relentless loop where he must save himself or repeat his fate.

desc: In a part of London with a strong Indian presence, an elderly woman originally from India anxiously awaits word of a community party invitation.

desc: A couple confronts hidden memories, revealing truths to each other and themselves, embarking on a transformative journey of self-discovery.

title: Last Day
desc: A hired killer accepts a contract to eliminate a target, a beautiful woman. He decides to romantically persuade her rather than resort to violence.

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.
